ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each company (ISIN) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in USD */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector within the industry */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Current valuation of the company */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* Reference to the company being invested in */,
  "weights" TEXT /* Weight of the investment in the portfolio (percentage) */,
  "investment_value" REAL /* Total investment value in USD */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment matures (for debt) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for debt investments */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for equity investments */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., Active, Liquidated) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio manager responsible for the investment */,
  "external_data_source_id" TEXT /* Reference to the external data source used for the investment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement target */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* Reference to the company for which the target is set */,
  "engagement_target" TEXT /* Description of the engagement target (e.g., 'Increase communication') */,
  "target_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for achieving the engagement target */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Status of the engagement target (e.g., Pending, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio manager assigned to the target */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the engagement target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_targets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_targets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., Equity, Debt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the investment type */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average historical return for the investment type */,
  "volatility_index" REAL /* Volatility index for the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the portfolio manager (e.g., Senior Manager, Analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the portfolio manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the firm */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio manager joined the firm */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor of the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_managers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment being reported */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the performance was reported */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the investment */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the investment */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return on investment */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the investment */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the investment */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the investment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the investment */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_reports_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_reports_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Details of the audit findings */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit (e.g., Financial, Operational) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the audit entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the audit entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_audits_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_audits_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_audits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
